title: centaurea calcitrapa subsp. cilicica
intro: Centaurea calcitrapa subsp. cilicica is a subspecies of the thistle-like plant, Centaurea calcitrapa, which is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea calcitrapa subsp. cilicica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system, while also exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral properties. Centaurea calcitrapa subsp. cilicica can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including wounds and digestive issues.
